summary: Comprehensive testing completed for St. Paul's School Management System. Backend APIs 98.3% successful (58/59 tests passed). All 16 modules fully functional with excellent UI/UX. Login, dashboard stats, navigation, and interactive features all working perfectly.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Settings page loads but backend update may fail

integration_issues.issue: Settings API returns 500 error, may affect settings updates

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console

passed_tests: Login with admin@stpauls.edu / admin123 works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows correct stats: 18 students, 12 staff, Rs 66,500 fees collected
Dashboard displays class-wise attendance chart and recent notices
Students page shows 18 students with search/filter functionality
Student profile navigation works (clicking student opens profile with tabs)
Attendance page has date picker, class/section filters, Present/Absent/Late/Leave buttons
Attendance Mark All Present button works with toast notification
Timetable page shows color-coded 7-period grid with teacher assignments
Timetable has exam schedule and teacher mapping tabs
Grades page shows inline editable marks with auto-grade calculation (67.1 avg, 100% pass rate)
Homework page shows 5 assignments with status tracking and assign modal
Fee Management displays payment records with collect fee functionality
Fee Structure shows class-wise fee table with concessions (10%, 15%, 25%)
Staff page displays 12 staff members with search and add functionality
Payroll page has process payroll functionality
Communication page shows inbox/notice/SMS tabs with message functionality
Transport page displays 3 routes with UP bus numbers and student mapping
Library page shows 10 books with issue/return/add book functionality
Reports page has 12 working report types including AI insights
Sidebar navigation works for all 16 modules
Logout button works and redirects to login page
Modal functionality works (enroll student modal opens/closes with Escape key)
All backend CRUD operations work (58/59 API tests passed)
Authentication and JWT token management works perfectly
All 16 module APIs functional with proper error handling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Settings API endpoint returning 500 error. All other functionality is working perfectly. This is a minor issue that doesn't affect core school management operations.
